content.en:
This figure who came to the Origin Realm Sea was the primordial ancestor who had already left the Origin Realm Sea for endless years.

For the first time, the Ten Elements Ancestor, the Primordial Ancestor, the Realm Ancestor, the Selfless True Ancestor and others sensed the arrival of the Primordial Ancestor and appeared for the first time.

And the Primal Ancestor wanted to return directly to the Origin Realm Sea, but found that he couldn't enter and was stopped outside the Origin Realm Sea barrier.

"A few old friends, why can't you enter the Origin Realm Sea?"

The Primal Ancestor asked suspiciously.

"Primal Ancestor, you haven't been back for too long, the Origin Realm Sea can't enter, and it rejects those of us who are beyond the Ten Realms-level controllers. Ten Xing Ancestor explained.

"Understood!" the Primal Ancestor suddenly realized, "It seems that the Origin Realm Sea has become more perfect. "

"Primordial Ancestor, why did you come back, I thought you would never come back!" said Primordial Ancestor in some surprise.

"Hahaha, some big gains, and I'm back!"

Taichu Ancestor said excitedly.

"Go to my primordial mountain, let's have a good talk. "

Primordial Ancestor proposed.

"Good!"

The Primal Ancestor nodded.

In an instant, several great beings who surpassed the Ten Realm-level masters went to the Primordial Mountain together, and then gathered together to chat.

Of course, they were all listening to the experience of the Taichu Ancestor and listening to the Taichu Ancestor's story.

Taichu Ancestor said: "At the beginning, I felt that there was no way forward, so I went to the end of the realm to survive, looking for opportunities, constantly shuttling and flying, constantly searching in the depths of the end of the realm, and even got lost many times, entered an area that could not be perceived, and even experienced danger many times. Until one day, I sensed the fluctuations of a battle. "

"Combat fluctuations?"

There was some speculation in everyone's hearts, but they did not interrupt the Taichu Ancestor's narration.

The Primal Ancestor continued, "When I approached the place of the battle, I realized that it was an incomparably terrifying creature fighting with a cultivator!"

"What, cultivator?Primal Ancestor, are you sure it's a cultivator like us? Shouldn't it be a cultivator of our Origin Realm Sea?"

The Primal Ancestor shook his head: "It's not a cultivator of the Origin Realm Sea, if it is a cultivator of the Origin Realm Sea that is even older, I don't know if I can't sense it." The breath of the other party is not the same as the breath of the Origin Realm Sea, and the path of cultivation is also different. And the strength of the other party is very strong, even stronger than me!"

"Could it be that the other party has reached another level and reached a new realm?"

Ten Elements of Ancestral Path.

"At first, I also thought that the other party had reached the realm above the controller, but then I realized that the other party had not reached a new realm above the Ten Realms level controller. Taichu Ancestor said: "I found a cultivator outside the Origin Realm Sea, so I was very excited, although I didn't know the other party's character, but I still helped him, and together with him, it was only then that the terrifying creature was crushed, and it took a long time to kill it." Later, when I talked to him, I learned that he was from a place called the Ruins of Eternity. Moreover, the other party showed me the direction of the eternal ruins. "

"And then, you went to the Ruins of Eternity?"

Primordial Ancestor was shocked.

"Yes!" the Primal Ancestor said, "After that, I went to the Eternal Ruins and saw a powerful place far beyond the Origin Realm Sea. "

"Isn't the Ruins of Eternity a powerhouse with a new realm above the Ten Realm-level masters?"

Ten Xingzu asked excitedly.

"Yes!" said the Primal Ancestor, "The Eternal Ruins were the same as our Origin Realm Sea at first, but they created a whole new realm, which they called the Perfect Master. And we can only call it a half-step perfect master. "

"The Perfect Master!"

The Ten Elements Ancestors were full of curiosity and eagerness one by one.

After all, they have been pursuing the realm above the Eternal Master, and now that they finally know that they are the Perfect Master, they are naturally excited, after all, they have a clear goal!

"Primordial Master, over there in the Ruins of Eternity, what conditions do you need to meet if you want to break through to the Perfect Master?" asked the Primordial Ancestor.

"The first is to condense the perfect will, the second is to form a perfectly controlled body, and the most important thing is the third point, to perfect one's own Tao to the level of the perfect one's own path. Not only that, but you also need to have a strong foundation and a certain level of combat effectiveness before you can break the shackles and become a perfect controller. The Primal Ancestor explained.

"I see!"

Shi Xingzu and the others nodded again and again.

At this time, the Primordial Ruler continued, "After finding the Ruins of Eternity, I continued to practice in the Ruins of Eternity and joined a force, and after a long time, I came back and informed you of the news. I will pass on some information to you, so that you too have a clear understanding. "

As he spoke, the primordial controller used his will to condense the information and transmit it to the Ten Elements Ancestors.

Soon, the Ten Elements Ancestors had a clear understanding of the Eternal Ruins.

In short, the Eternal Ruins are very powerful, far beyond the Origin Realm Sea, and there are not just one or two perfect controllers of the Eternal Ruins, but quite a few.

For example, the force that the primordial controller joins has a perfect master.

"I really want to go to the Eternal Ruins, it should be extremely far away from our Origin Realm Sea!"

Primordial Ancestor asked.

"It's really far away!" the primordial master nodded, "However, there is also a shortcut to the ruins of eternity, at the end of the realm, there is a space-time void rift, and the space-time void rift can allow us to instantly cross an incomparably long distance. And there are many space-time voids between the Origin Realm Sea and the Eternal Ruins, and if we pass through the space-time void cracks, we will probably only need a billion realm river years to reach the Eternal Ruins. "

"One billion realm river years, this is also a long time!"

Ten Elements of Ancestral Path.

The Primal Ancestor smiled and said, "This is already very short, when I traveled to the end of the realm for three hundred billion realm river years, I was lucky enough to come across the ruins of eternity, and now the billion realm river years are very short compared to the three hundred billion realm river years. "

"That's just as well!"

Primordial Ancestors, they all nodded.

At this time, the Primal Ancestor suggested: "I'll just come back this time to take a look, and by the way, I would like to inform you that if you want to become a perfect master, you had better go to the Eternal Ruins, in that case, you can hope to become a perfect master, otherwise in the Origin Realm Sea, relying on your own groping, you will accidentally take the wrong path." Also, don't expect it to last forever. Perhaps, you think that on this side of the Origin Realm Sea, you are almost invincible, and your life is very comfortable, then you are very wrong. As far as I know, every once in a while, the Realm Tribulation will break out, and some incomparably terrifying creatures in the Realm will destroy everything, if the Origin Realm Sea does not have enough strength to protect itself, maybe one day it will be trampled by an incomparably terrifying creature. "

When the Taichu Ancestor said this, the faces of the Ten Elements Ancestors changed one by one.

It's true that some of them have given up on being the perfect master, and think it's not bad to just go on and on.

But if there is an external threat, if it does not grow, it will one day be destroyed in such a crisis in the future.

"Originally, I wanted to stay in the Origin Realm Sea for a long time, but I didn't expect to be able to enter it now, so I'll stay around here for a while, if any of you want to go to the Eternal Ruins, you can let me know. Also, I'll leave some maps that you can use to go to the Ruins of Eternity in the future. "

Taichu Ancestor Dao.

"Thank you!"

Shi Xingzu and the others said.
